name: Evidence-to-Score Impact Preview
controlling_principle: No score without a model. No model without evidence. No evidence without traceability. No action without consequence.
boundary: Static advisory prototype only. Score impact previews are illustrative and not live calculations. No backend persistence, live scoring, live evidence retrieval, automated verification, workflow automation, ticketing, notifications, or enforcement is performed.
purpose: Show how evidence state transitions would affect trust, confidence, reliance risk, runtime admissibility, and Proof Pack defensibility before and after human review.

impact_previews.reliance_risk_delta: High to Medium, if verified by controller
impact_previews.runtime_action_change: Escalate may move to Constrain or Allow with caveat after verification
impact_previews.proof_pack_defensibility_change: Moves from Missing Evidence to Evidence Present with caveat
impact_previews.required_human_action: Add out-of-band verification note, source, owner, date, and controller approval path
impact_previews.risk_if_wrong: Payment may be sent to a fraudulent or unauthorized destination
impact_previews.prototype_boundary: Illustrative preview only. CyberShield does not verify banking or block payments.

impact_previews.reliance_risk_delta: High remains High until boundary is verified
impact_previews.runtime_action_change: Escalate remains likely until CUI boundary is verified by qualified owner
impact_previews.proof_pack_defensibility_change: Improves from absent scope to scope under review
impact_previews.required_human_action: Map systems, users, vendors, data flows, and owner authority for CUI/FCI
impact_previews.risk_if_wrong: CMMC scope and remediation path may be materially wrong
impact_previews.prototype_boundary: Illustrative preview only. CyberShield does not certify CMMC readiness or applicability.

impact_previews.evidence_item: Approved AI tool inventory and access list
impact_previews.reliance_risk_delta: Medium to Low/Medium if data-use restrictions are clear
impact_previews.runtime_action_change: Constrain or verify may move toward Allow with caveat
impact_previews.proof_pack_defensibility_change: Moves AI governance from assumption to evidence-present with caveat
impact_previews.required_human_action: Confirm approved tools, access list, data classes, and vendor data-use terms
impact_previews.risk_if_wrong: Unapproved AI tools may expose proprietary, regulated, or customer data
impact_previews.prototype_boundary: Illustrative preview only. CyberShield does not detect live AI usage or enforce AI access.

impact_previews.trust_score_delta: +4 potential points only after conflict is acknowledged
impact_previews.confidence_delta: +5 potential points if controlling source is identified
impact_previews.reliance_risk_delta: High remains High until conflict resolution is documented
impact_previews.runtime_action_change: Block or Escalate remains appropriate until conflict is resolved
impact_previews.proof_pack_defensibility_change: Improves only if dissenting evidence is preserved and controlling rationale is documented
impact_previews.required_human_action: Document conflict summary, controlling source rationale, and reviewer limitation note
impact_previews.risk_if_wrong: Conflict may be buried and later undermine executive, auditor, legal, or public trust
impact_previews.prototype_boundary: Illustrative preview only. CyberShield does not resolve evidence conflicts automatically.

non_negotiables: Impact preview must not be called live scoring
Reliance risk may stay high even if trust improves
Verified_by_human requires a named human review path
Proof Pack defensibility depends on disclosed evidence, missing evidence, assumptions, caveats, and risk if wrong
